Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Subpoenaed Non-Party Witneses Cognex Corporation, Aaron Miner, Matt Remnek, Ivy Dewitt, Jeff Ball And Nick Vu To Quash Deposition Subpoenas, And For A Protective Order;
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Linda Auerbach Allderdice, Esq. and Adanna Love, Esq. of Holland & Knight, Tel. 415.743.6954, for third party witnesses and moving party;
Joshua S. Hodas, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 213.680.5037, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court did not issue a ruling. NON PARTY WITNESSES COGNEX CORPORATION, AARON MINER, MATT REMNEK, IVY DEWITT, JEFF BALL and NICK VU's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoenas, And For A Protective Order is continued to April 8, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Parties were instructed by the Court to meet and confer prior to the hearing and try to reach an agreement. If not, the Court is inclined to appoint a Special Master at the hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR# 13714, Tel. 888.575.3376.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Subpoenaed Non-Party Witneses Cognex Corporation, Aaron Miner, Matt Remnek, Ivy Dewitt, Jeff Ball And Nick Vu To Quash Deposition Subpoenas, And For A Protective Order;
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Continued To Mar-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Linda Auerbach Allderdice, Esq. of Holland & Knight, Tel. 415.743.6900, for non party witnesses and moving party;
Joshua S. Hodas, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 213.680.5037 for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Neither party stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, OTHER COGNEX CORPORATION, AARON MINER, MATT REMNEK, IVY DEWITT, JEFF BALL and NICK VU'S Motion Of Subpoenaed Non-Party Witnesses Cognex Corporation, Aaron Miner, Matt Remnek, Ivy Dewitt, Jeff Ball And Nick Vu To Quash Deposition Subpoenas, And For A Protective Order is continued to March 13, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge Pro Tem shall prepare a Report and Recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
